items.caption: A well-stocked hardware store shelf with a variety of tools and supplies neatly organized on metal pegs. the foreground features a selection of paintbrushes, paint rollers, and paint trays, with some items still in their original packaging. the middle ground shows a range of paintbrushes, some with wooden handles and others with metal or plastic handles. the background reveals more tools and supplies, including paintbrushes, paint rollers, and possibly other painting accessories. the overall impression is of a well-organized and comprehensive selection for a home remodeling project.
